vehicle.label: Tiltrotor VTOL Hybrid
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles, BVLOS long-range capable

parts.label: Center Fuselage Spine
parts.spec: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

parts.label: Main Wing (2-piece)
parts.spec: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

parts.label: Nacelle Assembly x 2
parts.spec: Tilting nacelle assembly, 0-90deg tilt axis, 6309 bearing set, servo-driven worm gear, motor and ESC pocket

parts.label: Tilt Servo + Linkage x 2
parts.spec: 25kg-cm DS3218 servo per nacelle, titanium pushrod, dual ball joints, tilt range 0-93deg, crash-tolerant

parts.label: V-Tail x 2 (Ruddervator)
parts.spec: +-35deg V-tail ruddervator pair, MG996R servo each, 30deg dihedral, CFRP sandwich panel, hinge piano wire

parts.label: Landing Gear (Tri)
parts.spec: Tricycle landing gear, spring-steel skid arms, 55mm dia wheels, CG at 1/3 chord, 200mm wheelbase

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide-In)
parts.spec: Belly slide-in battery bay, 6S 8000mAh Li-ion pack, Velcro + strap dual retention, CG position 28% MAC

parts.label: Payload Nose Bay
parts.spec: Interchangeable nose payload bay, Day/IR camera gimbal or survey sensor, 80x60x50mm, 300g payload limit

parts.label: Tilt-Axis Harness + Datum Service Bay
parts.spec: Tiltrotor integration_service module with tilt-axis harness_channel, slack_loop, interface_datum, service_hatch, connector keying, and nacelle-to-wing load-path inspection access

verify.rule: Ensure critical joints have visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.

risk.desc: Potential for thermal stress due to high heat dissipation from avionics bay.
risk.mit: Implement thermal management solutions such as heat sinks or cooling channels.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure at wing spar socket under high loading conditions.
risk.mit: Increase structural reinforcement around the wing spar socket.

risk.desc: Possible misalignment during assembly due to complex interface requirements.
risk.mit: Improve assembly instructions and alignment tools.

risk.desc: Risk of water ingress through camera window due to insufficient sealing.
risk.mit: Enhance sealing around the camera window.

risk.desc: Potential for service access panel to become entombed during assembly.
risk.mit: Ensure clear access paths for service access panel.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

physics_paths.path: Nacelle loads from wing spar socket into fuselage spine
Avionics cooling airflow through avionics bay and belly camera window
Heat dissipation from avionics bay to fuselage exterior
V-tail/ruddervator and landing gear movement through fuselage spine
Service access for avionics bay and camera window

manufacturing_strategy.datum: Primary locating faces and rail guides
manufacturing_strategy.tolerance: H7/h6 fit class for bolted interfaces, LC2 for snap fits
manufacturing_strategy.support: Horizontal orientation for FDM, vertical for CNC
manufacturing_strategy.inspection: Visual and tactile inspection for fit and finish

risk.desc: Potential misalignment of tilt axis with wing spar socket and fuselage spine mount.
risk.mit: Ensure tilt axis is aligned with wing spar socket and fuselage spine mount during assembly.

risk.desc: Cooling channel efficiency may be compromised if surface area is not maximized.

risk.desc: Tilt axis travel range and preload may not be verified if boundary conditions are not properly set.
risk.mit: Set boundary conditions accurately for tilt axis travel range and preload verification.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Tricycle landing gear, spring-steel skid arms, 55mm dia wheels, CG at 1/3 chord, 200mm wheelbase
